title: SMP - Optimized
description: The Best Ressource Pack for SMP.
body:
# SMP - Optimized

_**This resource pack was created with the goal of providing the best SMP experience.**_

**This Pack modifies the following items/particules:**

> **New Glint & Armor/Weapons** _(Release)_

> **Totem Scale + Particle** _(Release)_

> **The Sun/Moon has been removed is the sky.**

> **Preview Video** _(Release)_

### Preview Video (Just Gameplay)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9ZODWzmsaLI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**_This pack is not only made for survival between friends, it is also made to play in multiplayer on servers pratice like._**

> **SwiftPvP** _(eu.swiftpvp.xyz)_

> **Minemen** _(Modern Practice)_

> **CatPvP**

> **MetalMC**

> **PvPClub**

**_This Resource Pack is compatible with all other resource packs, you just need to put it in the first line of resource packs for it to work._**

**_Using this pack, yKoseli got Low Tier 3 on SMP 2times._**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bcd234e2bf1f257ca86c8b7a8b5d38db12980a8.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ba5fb4621963e489a1ec60915b05a9058b3f2f2.png)

# SMP By yKoseli
